title: Supercell operations project-local baseline
content: The supercell operations project-local surface is anchored to the main branch of drop0ne/drop0ne-atticus-supercell. The current operating baseline includes a complete template pack with reusable files, a checklist plus starter-manifest workflow, and a one-file instantiation packet. Project-local instantiations now exist for AMAS, ATTICUS_MPO, and ATTICUS framework, and supercell_ops serves as the end-to-end validation case for the one-file packet workflow.
context_summary: Durable baseline cell for supercell operations, preserving the current supercell architecture and project-instantiation workflow state.
